text: Surrounded by pristine glass walls, inviting lighting, and thoughtful signage, I feel as though I stand at the threshold of innovation. The environment is orderly, almost clinical—yet there’s anticipation stirring within me. As I step closer to the brightly colored R+D display and read the introspective words about place and connection, curiosity blossoms. I am drawn to reflect on the relationship between human ingenuity and the world we inhabit. Here, I feel both small in the midst of progress and inspired to contemplate my own place within it.
